samePriceForProduct(String, String, String) - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Checks if a product with the same name and price is already present in the shop's catalogue.
setBrand(String) - Method in class Business.Products.Product
Sets the brand of the product.
setCatalogue(ArrayList<SpecificProduct>) - Method in class Business.Shops.Shop
Sets the catalog of the shop.

Sets the current threshold prices for shops in the cart.

Abstract method to set the discount for the product.

Sets the discount for the product.

Sets the discount for the product.
setDiscount(float) - Method in class Business.Products.ProductSuperReduced
Sets the discount for the product.
setDiscountToShop(int) - Method in class Business.CartManager
Sets the discount flag for a specific shop.
setIncome(float) - Method in class Business.Shops.Shop
Sets the accumulated earnings of the shop.

Sets the possible sponsored brands for shops in the cart.
setPossibleThresholdPrice(ArrayList<String>) - Method in class Business.Cart
Sets the possible threshold prices for shops in the cart.
setPrice(float) - Method in class Business.Products.SpecificProduct
Sets the price of the product.
setProductToShop(String, String, String, String, float) - Method in class Business.Cart
Adds a product to the specified shop in the cart.
setRatings(ArrayList<String>) - Method in class Business.Products.SpecificProduct
Sets the ratings for the product.
setReview(String) - Method in class Business.Products.Product
Adds a review to the product.
setReviews(ArrayList<String>) - Method in class Business.Products.Product
Sets the reviews for the product by adding the specified reviews to the existing ones.
setReviewsForShop(ArrayList<String>) - Method in class Business.Products.SpecificProduct
Sets the reviews for the shop.
setShops(ArrayList<Shop>) - Method in class Business.Cart
Sets a new value to all the shops in the cart.
setSpecificProductToShop(String, String, String, String, ArrayList<String>, ArrayList<String>) - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Adds a specific product to the catalogue of a shop.
setSponsoredBrand(String) - Method in class Business.Shops.ShopSponsored
Sets the sponsored brand associated with the shop.
Shop - Class in Business.Shops
The `Shop` class represents a shop in the shopping center with basic information and functions.
Shop(String) - Constructor for class Business.Shops.Shop
Constructor to initialize a shop with a specified name.
Shop(String, String, int, String) - Constructor for class Business.Shops.Shop
Constructor to initialize all the attributes of a shop object.
Shop(String, String, String, String, float) - Constructor for class Business.Shops.Shop
Constructor to initialize a shop with a product in its catalog.
ShopApiDAO - Class in Persistance
The ShopApiDAO class provides data access functionality for managing shop data using an API.
ShopApiDAO() - Constructor for class Persistance.ShopApiDAO
Initializes the ShopApiDAO by creating a Gson instance for JSON processing.
ShopDAO - Interface in Persistance
The ShopDAO interface defines the contract for data access functionality related to managing shop data using JSON files.
shopHasProducts(String) - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Checks if a shop has any products in its catalogue.
shopInThreshold(int) - Method in class Business.CartManager
Checks if a specific shop is in the threshold.
ShopJsonDAO - Class in Persistance
The ShopJsonDAO class provides data access functionality for managing shop data using JSON files.
ShopJsonDAO() - Constructor for class Persistance.ShopJsonDAO
Constructs a new ShopJsonDAO with default values and initializes the Gson instance.
ShopLoyalty - Class in Business.Shops
The `ShopLoyalty` class represents a shop with a loyalty business model.
ShopLoyalty(String, String, int, float, String, ArrayList<SpecificProduct>, float) - Constructor for class Business.Shops.ShopLoyalty
Constructs a new `ShopLoyalty` instance with the specified parameters.
ShopLoyalty(String, String, String, String, float) - Constructor for class Business.Shops.ShopLoyalty
Constructs a new `ShopLoyalty` instance for a specific product in a shop.
ShopManager - Class in Business
Manages shops, providing functionalities related to shop data and operations.
ShopManager() - Constructor for class Business.ShopManager
Constructs a ShopManager and initializes the ShopJsonDAO.
ShopMaxBenefit - Class in Business.Shops
The `ShopMaxBenefit` class represents a shop with a maximum benefit business model.
ShopMaxBenefit(String, String, int, float, String, ArrayList<SpecificProduct>) - Constructor for class Business.Shops.ShopMaxBenefit
Constructs a new `ShopMaxBenefit` instance with the specified parameters.
ShopMaxBenefit(String, String, String, String, float) - Constructor for class Business.Shops.ShopMaxBenefit
Constructs a new `ShopMaxBenefit` instance for a specific product in a shop.
ShopSponsored - Class in Business.Shops
The `ShopSponsored` class represents a sponsored shop that extends the base `Shop` class.
ShopSponsored(String, String, int, float, String, ArrayList<SpecificProduct>, String) - Constructor for class Business.Shops.ShopSponsored
Constructs a new `ShopSponsored` instance with the specified parameters.
ShopSponsored(String, String, String, String, float) - Constructor for class Business.Shops.ShopSponsored
Constructs a new `ShopSponsored` instance for a specific product in a shop.
showMessage(String) - Method in class Presentation.UIManager
Displays a message with a new line.
showMessageWithNoSpace(String) - Method in class Presentation.UIManager
Displays a message without a new line.
SpecificProduct - Class in Business.Products
The SpecificProduct class extends the Product class and represents a specific instance of a product with additional attributes like price, ratings, and reviews specific to a shop.
SpecificProduct(String, float, String, ArrayList<String>, ArrayList<String>) - Constructor for class Business.Products.SpecificProduct
Constructor for creating a SpecificProduct with specified attributes.
SpecificProduct(String, String, float) - Constructor for class Business.Products.SpecificProduct
Constructor for creating a SpecificProduct with specified attributes.
